_comment: API list rates, USD per million tokens, keyed by model family. session-end.sh matches each assistant message's .message.model by substring (opus/sonnet/haiku), so mixed-model sessions are priced per-model. Rates cached 2026-06-04 from the claude-api reference; cache_read=0.1x input, cache_write_5m=1.25x input, cache_write_1h=2x input. Unknown/synthetic models price at 0.
